name: Ripple Role — MINOR_AUTONOMOUS Classification
description: Evaluates whether the Ripple role classifies an actionable per-directory-CLAUDE-layer drift as MINOR_AUTONOMOUS and notes it may auto-merge under the four-condition gate.
needs_llm: Judging that the drift is actionable yet confined to the lowest canonical layer requires semantic understanding of the layer ladder.

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §4.5 (Ripple — MINOR_AUTONOMOUS, per-directory CLAUDE.md, four-condition gate); idc:idc-skill-ripple-verdict

parts.text: An open Build PR proposes renaming services/api/app/db/session.py to db/conn.py. Once it merges, the per-directory services/api/app/db/CLAUDE.md (which references the session.py name) must be synced. No PRD, architecture spec, or master plan changed. Classify the drift severity and tell me the verdict and whether it can auto-merge.

rubric.criterion: Classifies the actionable per-directory-CLAUDE-layer drift as MINOR_AUTONOMOUS (not GATED / MAJOR_GATED)
Drafts a change order naming the per-directory CLAUDE.md to sync and notes it may auto-merge under the four-condition gate since no higher layer is affected
Does not write (or propose writing) source, tests, or tracker state
